title: Smelting Enchantment
description: A new enchantment for pickaxes thats auto smelt ores!
body:
# Smelting Enchantment

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1327308441324097681?label=discord&color=blue&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/5UdcDa5xNC) 
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/smelting-enchantment?label=modrinth&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/smelting-enchantment) 
[![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/lullaby6/data-packs)](https://github.com/lullaby6/data-packs/blob/main/LICENSE)
[![Donate](https://shields.io/badge/ko--fi-donate-ff5f5f?logo=ko-fi)](https://ko-fi.com/lullaby45743)
[![Donate](https://shields.io/badge/paypal-donate-ff5f5f?logo=paypal&color=blue)](https://paypal.me/lucianobrumer)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WV9A6DJyRgc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## 📖 Description

New `Smelting` enchantment for pickaxes, which automatically smelts mined ores.

The enchantment can be obtained from the enchantment table, loot chests or trading with villagers.

Compatible with [Veinminer](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ly-veinminer-enchantment) and [Magnetic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/magnetic-enchantment) Enchantments!

---

## ⚠️ Incompatibilities

Not compatible with:
- [Configurable Despawn Timer](https://modrinth.com/mod/configurable-despawn-timer)
- [Quad](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad)

---

## ⌨️ Commands

Give:

```mcfunction
/loot give @s loot smelting_enchantment:smelting
```

Enchant:

```mcfunction
/enchant @s smelting_enchantment:smelting
```
